description_long: This is a three-story brick house with a symmetrical facade and a steep, dark hip roof. The front features large, evenly spaced rectangular windows and a central entryway with double doors flanked by planters. The left side includes two balconies with blue railings and a tree partially obscuring the lower level. The rear of the house is simpler, with fewer windows and a garage door, as well as utility elements like a small staircase and external piping. The right side displays a mix of windows, a small balcony, and visible HVAC units, with landscaping elements such as bushes and trees at the corners. The house sits on a paved lot, suggesting an urban or suburban setting.
description: A three-story brick house with a hip roof, symmetrical windows, balconies, and a central entryway, set on a paved lot with landscaping.
description_view_0: The front view shows a symmetrical brick facade with large windows, a central double-door entryway, and planters.
description_view_1: The left side features two blue-railed balconies, large windows, and a tree partially obscuring the lower level.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals a simpler facade with fewer windows, a garage door, and external utility elements.
description_view_3: The right side displays a small balcony, visible HVAC units, and a mix of windows, with bushes at the corners.
attribute_entryway_design: Central double-door entry with planters, no porch, and minimal decorative elements
